notes: Chunk 44 (Template D, Tier B) complete 2026-06-10. Two parallel runs: (1) 25 new routes: EU-to-USA x10 (Greece/Austria/Belgium/Finland/Malta/Romania/Cyprus/Hungary/Bulgaria/Croatia), to-UK unlisted x4 (Morocco/Bangladesh/Myanmar/Ethiopia), EU-to-UK listed x2 (Slovakia/Luxembourg), SE Asia outbound x9 (Japan/Thailand/S.Korea to Mexico/Brazil/Indonesia/Malaysia). Routes 5531->5556, pages 6324->6350. (2) 25 existing stub upgrades: EU-to-AU x10 (Spain/Italy/Netherlands/Sweden/Norway/Belgium/Switzerland/Portugal/Poland/Austria), EU-to-CA x9 (Spain/Italy/Netherlands/Sweden/Norway/Portugal/Belgium/Switzerland/Austria), EU-to-NZ x5 (Germany/France/Spain/Netherlands/Italy), DE-to-US x1. Blog Day 14: pet-transport-within-uk.md (Marcus Webb, 2200 words). Next: Chunk 45 (Template E, Tier B). Blog Day 15 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
